title: Slovakian Carrot Hash with Zesty Twist
description: A vibrant twist on a traditional Slovakian dish, this carrot hash is gluten-free and packed with flavor. The addition of tangy and zesty notes elevates the humble carrot to new heights.

ingredients.name: hash browns
ingredients.notes: make sure to use gluten-free hash browns

ingredients.name: zesty sauce
ingredients.notes: such as sriracha mayo or hot sauce

ingredients.name: tangy mustard
ingredients.notes: such as whole-grain or gluten-free mustard

instructions: In a large skillet, cook the sliced Slovakian sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated carrots and shredded hash browns to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional zesty sauce and tangy mustard.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the carrots are tender and the top is golden brown.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
